programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Bigger Car (Part 4): Today the new baby seat has arrived, but the family car has no room for it! With help from Peppa and George, Daddy Pig chooses a bigger car for the family.
An Beárbaiciú: Tá sé in am lóin ar chúl tigh Bluey agus Dheaide. Ach cén mhaith BBQ gan sailéad leis - ní stopfaidh Bingo go mbeidh piobar de gach dath faighte aici dá cuid col ceathracha.
Ialtóga: Níl Bluey ag iarraidh dul a chodladh. Samhlaíonn sí dá mbeadh sí ina hialtóg oíche go bhféadfadh sí fanacht ina suí go maidin.
Punky and her class friends need more than one teacher, most of the time.
Hedgie Highway: Pins and Nettie love exploring and wandering along the Hedgehog Highway. But this time they encounter a new door and the hedgies don't know what to make of it.
Dylan the Rock Star wants to rock out at a concert - but getting to the stage on time is a lot harder than he thought!
Dylan the Plumber wants to keeps the pipes clear, so when Ozzy's hat falls in they have to work extra hard to get it out!
Jodi is nervous on her first day at a new school, so Teacher Harriet explains to Jodi that she can find something or someone she knows to help herself feel better.
When Banba's favourite mug is accidentally broken, the friends must work together to make him a new one.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'l', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We meet some lovely lambs, use our legs and see a ladybird with a lollipop!
Glitch seeks somewhere cold to cool down after the heating in Grim HQ gets stuck on, and he decides on Harbin Ice City in China.
Ricky Slows Down: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
Synecdoche Oswaldo: Oswaldo decides to put on a play about his summer.
Stego and Saurus - Pleading the Fifth (Grade): Oswaldo and Dimitri investigate the disappearance of a book from the school library.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Where's My Talent?: Lex accidentally floods the room where his customer August keeps his collection of soda caps, ruining the most valuable one.
The Ambition Badge: The squirrels learn how to achieve their ambitions.
The Rainbow Badge: The Squirrels see a rainbow for the very first time, but it disappears so quickly! Together they decide to create a rainbow themselves from everything around them.
Zoom wants to find out how to catch the wind and make electricity, so Mark and Amy introduce her to the wonderful world of wind turbines, including a visit to a wind farm at sea! (SL)
Peeling Time Vision: Exploring the stream, Fuzzy Yellow and friends find an extra pair of eyes! They take turns trying them out to see what they might see. (SL)
Bigger Car (Part 4): Today the new baby seat has arrived, but the family car has no room for it! With help from Peppa and George, Daddy Pig chooses a bigger car for the family.
An Beárbaiciú: Tá sé in am lóin ar chúl tigh Bluey agus Dheaide. Ach cén mhaith BBQ gan sailéad leis - ní stopfaidh Bingo go mbeidh piobar de gach dath faighte aici dá cuid col ceathracha.
Ialtóga: Níl Bluey ag iarraidh dul a chodladh. Samhlaíonn sí dá mbeadh sí ina hialtóg oíche go bhféadfadh sí fanacht ina suí go maidin.
Punky and her class friends need more than one teacher, most of the time.
Pop Goes Circus: The friends are joining Hooper's circus school! But when Plom struggles to find a skill he's good at, will he be able to earn his circus school certificate?
Henry meets a sleepy Bear in the woods. It's almost winter so it's time for Bear to hibernate but he's having trouble falling asleep.
Snowy Tic-Tac-Toe: The Game Catchers embark on a mission on an enchanting Christmas-themed planet, where they learn the game Super Tic-Tac-Toe.
What Animal Are You?: The Game Catchers land on a Technological Planet and learn the game 'What Animal Are You?' But before they can start, they'll need to go on a search to find Nina!
While getting ready for a wedding, Pablo wonders where is mum has gone.
Mouse is obliged to take lessons from Sir Knight. He takes great pleasure in teaching her about the rules of the Knight's code, but Mouse herself is less enthusiastic.
Lily discovers an old compass washed up on the beach that proves to be very useful when Bull gets in trouble on the Great North Cliff.
Lily finds a napkin on the beach. It's just the thing for the Driftwood Bay picnic, and Lily finds Bull talking to his friend, Bee. When Bee vanishes, Lily helps Bull find him.
Tá go leor le déanamh ar an gcrús, ar nós bricfeasta a ithe sa gcaifé foghlaithe mara!
Stopann an crús ag oileán agus ceannaíonn an teaghlach go leor rudaí beaga.
Cnoc Craptha Clupaideach: Tagann Breacaí ar leathanach craptha, clupaideach as sceitsleabhar. Ní dhearna sí breacphictiúr lena leithéid de leathanach brocach, rocach riamh! Cá dtosóidh sí?
Breacadharcach: Cuidíonn Breacaí lena cara nua Capall-Each le réiteach do sheó tallainne na n-aonadharcach. Faigheann siad amach gur ionat féin a aimseoidh tú an tallann is fearr!
Tuar ceatha: Is mian le Oona tuar ceatha álainn a thaispeáint do Bhaba ag an eas, ach muna stopann sé ag dul ar seachrán agus muna ndéanann sé deifir, caillfidh sé an tuar ceatha céanna.
Taisce puifín: Tá Oona agus Silky fá choinne an foraois ceilpeanna a fhiosrú ach tá Baba ró-óg le dul leo.
Spooooky!: With the help of a timid mouse, Odo plays a trick on the campers that they will never forget.
Hedgie Highway: Pins and Nettie love exploring and wandering along the Hedgehog Highway. But this time they encounter a new door and the hedgies don't know what to make of it.
Flamingos: Andy takes Kip to sees flamingos in Kenya.
Ricky Slows Down: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.

Mission: Astronomy Adventure: When a group of astronomers get lost on Woofton Hill at night, Dan and Jamie get their kit together for a night-time search.
Dogs With Jobs: Maddie + Triggs are on their way to the dog park with Mum when they meet a new friend, Lolo. Lolo is a guide dog and expains what it means to be a dog with a job.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Brilliant Bodies
programmes.show_description: Bellybuttons: Nina investigates what bellybuttons are for, with the help of Luke, her sight neuron.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.

Lily finds a napkin on the beach. It's just the thing for the Driftwood Bay picnic, and Lily finds Bull talking to his friend, Bee. When Bee vanishes, Lily helps Bull find him.
Tá Peppa agus a teaghlach sa veain champála mhór ag taisteal ar fud Mheiriceá. Stopann siad ag bialann agus castar Miss Rabbit eile orthu.
Téann Peppa agus a teaghlach trasna Mheiriceá, trasna an chainneoin, trasna na dtonnta agus tagann siad ar phluais ó 700AD.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Brilliant Bodies
programmes.show_description: Bellybuttons: Nina investigates what bellybuttons are for, with the help of Luke, her sight neuron.
Mission: Astronomy Adventure: When a group of astronomers get lost on Woofton Hill at night, Dan and Jamie get their kit together for a night-time search.
MeMo and BaBa play dress up. MeMo finds a way that they can both play with a pretty tutu.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Jigsaw Festival: Peppa and George are at a Jigsaw festival with Granny and Grandpa Pig. Old Mrs Donkey explains how important it is not to lose a jigsaw piece.
Capaill agus Capaill Bhréige: Déanann Bluey dearmad an bréagán is fearr léi a chur i dtaisce agus beireann Socks, col ceathrar Muffin, air agus ní thabharfaidh sí ar ais di é.
An t-Óstán: Tá 'Óstán' craiceáilte á rith ag Bluey agus Bingo agus is é Deaid an chéad chuairteoir a fhanann ann. Nuair a chailleann Bingo foighne le Bluey.
Con's big brother role is a big help to Punky and her upcoming school trip.
Hedgie Hiccups: Children's programme about two shy little hedgehogs who love to explore.
Dylan the Janitor wants to clean the school, so when he encounters some extra sticky slime, he'll have to pull out all the mops!
Dylan the Delivery Driver wants to deliver all his packages safely, but his final delivery of the day is gonna be a real challenge.
Daniel goes to Jodi's house after school. At first, Daniel feels a little nervous because he's never played at Jodi's house after school before.
Fia and her best friend Ameer learn about the enchanting Irish language through exciting adventures with a pair of fairies and their magical friends.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'm', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We jump in some mud, drink some milk and meet some musical meerkats!
The Go Jetties race to save the White Cliffs of Dover.
Motorbikes On The Moon: The Buddies build a rocket for a trip to the moon. But who's going to make the flight?
No Hay Banda: Oswaldo seeks out solo fame after he, Leia and Tobias are mistaken as members of a band.
Oswalsdo Goes Advertisement: Oswaldo ends up hired as an Ad Man.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Loud in the Clouds: Fur Taxi gets a fare: they need to take an aspiring reporter to an asteroid so he can film a segment about the galaxy's most talented racer!
The Dream Badge: The squirrels are at the clubhouse playing, but they cannot stop thinking about the dreams they had last night.
The Eating Badge: The squirrels have a picnic and notice that the chickens eat differently than they do.
Zoom makes a mess with toothpaste so she wants to find out more about pressure. The kids are outside to show a pressure experiment but can Mark and Amy make a ping pong ball eruption? (SL)
Boomerang Jelly Car: As Fuzzy Yellow is followed by a big space-jellyfish, Bennu and Moon build a wooden downhill-racing car. (SL)
Jigsaw Festival: Peppa and George are at a Jigsaw festival with Granny and Grandpa Pig. Old Mrs Donkey explains how important it is not to lose a jigsaw piece.
Capaill agus Capaill Bhréige: Déanann Bluey dearmad an bréagán is fearr léi a chur i dtaisce agus beireann Socks, col ceathrar Muffin, air agus ní thabharfaidh sí ar ais di é.
An t-Óstán: Tá 'Óstán' craiceáilte á rith ag Bluey agus Bingo agus is é Deaid an chéad chuairteoir a fhanann ann. Nuair a chailleann Bingo foighne le Bluey.
Con's big brother role is a big help to Punky and her upcoming school trip.
The Missing Star: It's Christmas time in Pop Paper City! Plom and Zip are decorating the tree, so they craft a new Christmas star.
Today Henry meets a cheeky Dustbin and his two brothers, Recycle Bin and Compost Bin.
Fly Fly!: The Game Catchers land on the Play Park Planet, where they learn the game 'The Balloon Caterpillar.'
The Origasaurus: The Game Catchers land on the Origami Planet and meet three aliens who can turn into whatever they want!
Pablo is nervous about a noisy birthday party. His animal friends help him realise that a party is just when friends get together.
Just before Prince has to give his first speech, Mister Witch accidentally transforms him into a horse. In order to change back, Prince has to be entranced.
Driftwood Bay is the busiest it has ever been and poor Hatsie is working very hard. She needs to take some time out to stop, think and relax.
Lily finds an old key washed up on the beach and sets sail for Driftwood Bay to find its owner.
Peppa and her family win a trip to America. Miss Rabbit flies them over to New York, where they meet a new Miss Rabbit.
The gang stop off at a diner as they continue their journey across America.
Aimsíonn na Beigíní gobán atá caillte ar an gcosán sa choill
Tá na Beigíní réitithe le hoíche spraoi a bheith acu cois tine, ag róstadh leamhacháin, agus ag éisteacht le Cóilín ag casadh ceoil go dtí go mbrisfidh sreang ar a giotár!!
Socraíonn ar na Beigíní cluiche a chruthú as rud clúmhach aisteach a aimsíonn siad ar a bhealach abhaile.
Mistéir Mossy: Tá Mossy ag fanacht leis an chaor is mó ar an oileán le haibiú ach faigheann na dallóga fraoigh an ceann is fearr ar achan ainmhí eile!
An lá is faide: An lá is faide den bhliain atá ann. Tagann Oona agus a cairde le chéile ag ciorcal na gcloch le héirí na gréine a fheiceáil, ach níor mhúscail Mossy in am!
The Kite: it is a windy day and Odo wants to fly his kite.
Hedgie Hiccups: Children's programme about two shy little hedgehogs who love to explore.
Capuchin Monkeys: Kip and Andy see capuchin monkeys in Brazil using rocks to open nuts.
Motorbikes On The Moon: The Buddies build a rocket for a trip to the moon. But who's going to make the flight?

programmes.show_description: Loud in the Clouds: Fur Taxi gets a fare: they need to take an aspiring reporter to an asteroid so he can film a segment about the galaxy's most talented racer!

Mission: Sound Tennis: Guide dog Kika uses her super sight to help Dr Amit and his friend Alana play a game of sound tennis. Kika tries not to chase the noisy balls at the sports centre.
There Yet?: Maddie + Triggs get the giggles as they repeatedly ask Dad, 'Are we there yet?', during a family car journey to Nana and Dadó's. If only Dad hadn't tried to take a shortcut!

Dylan the Delivery Driver wants to deliver all his packages safely, but his final delivery of the day is gonna be a real challenge.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Brilliant Bodies
programmes.show_description: Scabs: Megan, Oscar and Ross visit Nina in hospital as they find out how scabs protect damaged skin by keeping germs out of the body, like a plaster.

BaBa enjoys sharing with friends and BaBa's friends enjoy sharing back.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
